title: LocalModelAdapter invariant enforcement (no third-party wrapping)
goal: Enforce the LocalModelAdapter invariant per spec §3.6: LocalModel runtime authority MUST NOT wrap a third-party app (LM Studio, Ollama) as its primary runtime path. Ship a guarded RuntimeKind enum + adapter-bind-time validation that rejects construction of a LocalModelAdapter whose engine_path resolves to a forbidden third-party-app process or HTTP endpoint pattern. ExternalEngineImport (spec §3.6.4) is the only pass-through lane and is flagged provider="external_compat".
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/invariant.rs with LocalModelAdapterInvariant + EngineOriginValidator + ExternalEngineImportRecord; updates to types.rs RuntimeKind + LoadSpec.
implementation_notes: Per spec §3.6.1 (operator-locked invariant): No LM Studio or Ollama runtime authority. LocalModelAdapterInvariant::validate(spec: &LoadSpec) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError> checks: (1) RuntimeKind is LlamaCpp or Candle (never ExternalCompat for LocalModelAdapter); (2) artifact_path is a regular file on disk (not a URL); (3) if a sibling field engine_origin is Some, it does not match a denylist of patterns: process name `lm_studio*`, `ollama*`, HTTP host patterns matching `localhost:11434` (Ollama default) or `localhost:1234` (LM Studio default) UNLESS the LoadSpec carries an ExternalEngineImportRecord — in which case the model is flagged `provider="external_compat"` and routed through the ExternalEngineImport lane (spec §3.6.4 AC-EXTERNAL-ENGINE-IMPORT) which does NOT register as Handshake-owned in ProcessOwnershipLedger. ExternalEngineImportRecord: `{ endpoint_url: Url, openai_compatible: bool, operator_signed_at_utc: DateTime<Utc>, operator_signature: String }`. The denylist is data-driven (deny_patterns Vec<String>) so future third-party apps can be added without code changes. Add LoadSpec field `provider: ProviderKind { Local, ExternalCompat, ByokCloud, OfficialCli }`. LocalModelAdapter wraps Box<dyn ModelRuntime> and runs validate() in its constructor; failed validation returns ModelRuntimeError::AdapterMismatch. Tests: load with engine_origin="ollama" without ExternalEngineImportRecord fails; same with record succeeds and flags provider=ExternalCompat; load with LlamaCpp + regular GGUF path succeeds. This MT is the runtime enforcement of the operator-locked invariant (spec §3.6); CX-503R adjacent (no SQLite) is enforced separately in MT-068.
risk_if_missed: Invariant becomes prose-only; a future contributor wraps Ollama as primary runtime authority, violating operator-locked spec §3.6.1.
validator_focus: Denylist enforces; ExternalEngineImport pass-through correctly flags provider=ExternalCompat; constructor validation runs unconditionally; signed ExternalEngineImportRecord required for the pass-through lane.

minimum_controls: Denylist patterns match case-insensitively (ollama, OLLAMA, Ollama all caught).
Pass-through lane signed_at_utc must be non-null and within operator-configured staleness window.
ProcessOwnershipLedger never records ExternalEngineImport endpoints as Handshake-owned (test asserts no insert on the lane).
